versions.version_description: My version has a better format with the chords written above the lyrics instead of in between the lyrics. Plus, it includes the background chords during the solo, interlude, plus the chords during the intro which aren't included in the other version. Plus I included the last part of the final chorus. My version has all the parts of the song clearly labeled AND the time signature.
Intro, Interlude, and Solo riffs included with acoustic chords.

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: Everything I Do I Do It For You

content:
Heaven - Bryan Adams
Arranged for one acoustic guitar


[Intro]
[ch]C[/ch]  [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]Gsus4[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]
[ch]C[/ch]  [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]Gsus4[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]   [ch]Am[/ch]                     [ch]G[/ch]                        [ch]Dm[/ch]           [ch]Am[/ch]
Oh, thinkin' about all our younger years, there was only you and me,[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Bb[/ch]             [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]Am[/ch]                    [ch]G[/ch]
we were young and wild and free. Now nothin' can take you away from me,[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Dm[/ch]               [ch]Am[/ch]               [ch]Bb[/ch]        [ch]Am[/ch]
we've been down that road before, but that's over now,[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]G[/ch]
you keep me comin' back for more.[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]Am[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]                [ch]F[/ch]
Baby you're all that I want, when you're lyin' here in my arms,[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]F[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]Am[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]
I'm findin' it hard to believe, we're in heaven.[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]F[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]Am[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]                     [ch]F[/ch]
And love is all that I need, and I found it here in your heart,[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]F[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]Am[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]
It isn't too hard to see, we're in heaven.[/tab]

[Instrumental]
[ch]C[/ch]  [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]Gsus4[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]   [ch]Am[/ch]                    [ch]G[/ch]                      [ch]Dm[/ch]               [ch]Am[/ch]
Oh, once in your life you find someone, who will turn your world around,[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Bb[/ch]                 [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]Am[/ch]
Bring you up when you're feelin' down. Ya, nothin' could change[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]G[/ch]                      [ch]Dm[/ch]                [ch]Am[/ch]
what you mean to me. Oh there's lots that I could say,[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Bb[/ch]          [ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]
but just hold me now,   cause our love will light the way.[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]Am[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]                [ch]F[/ch]
Baby you're all that I want, when you're lyin' here in my arms,[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]F[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]Am[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]
I'm findin' it hard to believe, we're in heaven.[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]F[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]Am[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]                     [ch]F[/ch]
And love is all that I need, and I found it here in your heart,[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]F[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]Am[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]
It isn't too hard to see, we're in heaven.[/tab]

[Bridge]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]                       [ch]F[/ch]                     [ch]Am[/ch]
I've been waitin' for so long, for somethin' to arrive,[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]Dm[/ch]                        [ch]F[/ch]
For love to come along.     Now our dreams are comin' true,[/tab]
[tab]                               [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]
Through the good times and the bad, ya, I'll be standin' there by you.[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]Am[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]                [ch]F[/ch]
Baby you're all that I want, when you're lyin' here in my arms,[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]F[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]Am[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]
I'm findin' it hard to believe, we're in heaven.[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]F[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]Am[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]                     [ch]F[/ch]
And love is all that I need, and I found it here in your heart,[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]F[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]Am[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]
It isn't too hard to see, we're in heaven.[/tab]

[ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
